mapper.select: /* OutboundBoxExportMapper.xml - selectOutboundBoxExportForInterfaceSend - 부자재(출고박스)반출 인터페이스 송신 대상 조회 */ SELECT BX.ICKEY, COUNT(BX.BOXBARCODE) QTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BX ON OH.CTKEY = BX.CTKEY AND OH.PCKGBOXBARCODE = BX.BOXBARCODE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON BX.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND BX.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBDDLNSNDRSLTCD = '20' /* 출고마감인터페이스 송신 정상 */ AND OH.OBBOXEXPTSNDYN = 'N' /* 출고박스반출 인터페이스 미송신 */ AND OBCNFRMDATE >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{day},'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '000000' AND OBCNFRMDATE < TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{day},'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') || '000000' GROUP BY BX.ICKEY
